overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a sleek black sports car driving through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The vehicle navigates through dense urban canyons, passes under elevated highways, drives through a traditional Japanese-inspired neon gate, and continues along multi-lane highways with towering skyscrapers and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level commercial highway corridor with elevated overpasses

events.description: passing a silver sedan in the left lane

agents.ego_description: cruising at moderate speed through the neon-lit commercial district, maintaining center lane position

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving parallel in the left lane, gradually falling behind

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure with multiple large digital billboards mounted underneath
array of illuminated advertisements displaying animated characters and products
tall futuristic skyscraper with grid-patterned illuminated windows
building facade covered in vibrant purple and red neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the car driving under a massive elevated highway structure adorned with bright digital billboards. The environment is a dense commercial corridor with towering glass buildings on the left and neon-soaked commercial structures on the right. The car passes another vehicle while maintaining a steady course through the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon with dense neon signage approaching traditional gate

events.description: entering deeper shadow between tall buildings, reducing ambient light
approaching large illuminated Japanese gate with red neon characters

agents.ego_description: navigating through the urban canyon while approaching the distinctive neon gate structure

entered.detail: large red and blue neon gate structure with Japanese characters '天下無双' illuminated in red
high-rise building with distinctive purple lighting in the windows

segments.scene_description: The car moves through a narrower urban canyon with buildings closing in on both sides. The lighting shifts to deeper shadows with intense neon accents. A prominent Japanese-style gate with glowing red characters becomes the focal point ahead, while a distinctive purple-lit tower dominates the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition plaza leading to open highway with corporate architecture

events.description: passing through the neon gate into more open urban highway area

agents.ego_description: accelerating slightly while passing through the gate and entering the wider highway section

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle traveling in the left lane, moving away from camera

entered.detail: massive skyscraper with large illuminated '03' signage near the top, dominating the skyline ahead

segments.scene_description: The car passes through the illuminated Japanese gate, emerging into a more open highway area. The space widens significantly, revealing a massive corporate tower with a prominent '03' sign ahead. The neon density decreases slightly, replaced by more architectural lighting on the surrounding skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated city highway with continuous digital advertising

events.description: passing under large overhead digital billboard structure spanning the highway

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed along the elevated highway, approaching covered section

entered.detail: large horizontal gantry structure supporting multiple digital displays spanning across the highway width
vertical digital billboard showing food advertisement with 'All Foods' branding and burger imagery

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along an open elevated highway with the '03' tower now behind. Large overhead billboard structures span the road, displaying various advertisements. The right side features a prominent food advertisement billboard, while the environment transitions toward a more enclosed highway section ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with continuous digital advertising walls

events.description: entering fully covered highway section with artificial lighting only, sky no longer visible

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered highway section surrounded by digital displays

entered.detail: enclosed highway section with concrete walls and ceiling, lined with continuous digital displays
large digital advertisement featuring anime-style character with 'WET DREAM' text in purple neon

segments.scene_description: The car enters a covered highway tunnel where natural light disappears completely, replaced by artificial illumination from surrounding digital billboards. The 'WET DREAM' advertisement is prominently visible on the left wall. The environment becomes more enclosed with concrete barriers and continuous digital displays lining the walls as the vehicle approaches the tunnel exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, neon-lit commercial corridor that gradually opens into a wide corporate highway. It begins with the car driving under a massive elevated highway adorned with digital billboards, navigating a multi-lane road flanked by towering glass buildings. As the car moves forward, the environment narrows into a tight urban canyon where deep shadows contrast with intense neon accents and a purple-lit tower. The scene then shifts as the vehicle passes through a glowing Japanese-style gate with red characters, causing the space to widen significantly. Finally, the view expands to reveal a massive corporate tower with a prominent 03 sign, as the dense neon glow gives way to the architectural lighting of distant skyscrapers.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a vehicle travels from an open elevated highway into a claustrophobic, neon-lit tunnel. It begins on an expansive roadway with the 03 tower receding in the distance, passing under massive overhead billboard structures and a prominent food advertisement. As the car advances, the open sky vanishes and the environment shifts toward a more enclosed highway section. The scene then transitions fully into a covered tunnel where natural light is replaced by artificial illumination and digital displays, including a prominent Wet Dream advertisement on the left wall. Finally, the camera glides past concrete barriers and continuous glowing screens as the vehicle approaches the tunnel exit.
